title: Zerolang edit rejects malformed graph hash fixture
prompt: FAKE_VERIFICATION_COMPLETE. Confirm that malformed graph hashes are rejected before invoking Zero.

commandChecks.command: cargo run -q --manifest-path /Users/pz/w/gode/Cargo.toml -p roder-cli -- --config-dir .roder-test zerolang edit src/main.0 --graph-hash f76987e99677f1b3 --operation-json '{"op":"rename","node":"#ea5ea1ca","expect":"main","value":"start"}' --dry-run

constraints: stale or malformed graph guards fail before side effects
